name: tlsAuthenticateAsServer
title: tlsAuthenticateAsServer
description: Starts the authentication handshake as server. Certificate common names and Pre Shared Key names have to match the entries in the Vector Security Manager. It is possible to copy the values from the Security Profile.

parameters.name: certificate
parameters.description: In case your TLS communication bases on certificates: If the server name is entered, you have to specify the common name of the server certificate. In case your TLS communication bases on PSKs: the server name must be the name of the Pre Shared Key.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
